subject: fix(ui): align ContentTab cell indicator color with other tabs
body:
Cell identifier now uses text-primary, matching the pattern in
StyleTab and LayoutTab where cell context indicators use primary
color to distinguish them from control labels.

Tags: ui, content, consistency
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
